name: Pouch
description: A small pouch, likely left behind by someone. I wonder what it contains... Found while Chopping.

name: Health Potion
description: A small vial, filled with red juice. Looks like a healing potion! Found in pouches.

name: Leaf
description: A small leaf, left behind by a tree. Found while Chopping.

name: Feather
description: A small feather, left behind by a bird. Found while Chopping.

name: Twig
description: A small twig, left behind by a tree. Found while Chopping.

name: Crate
description: A small crate, likely left behind from some operation. I wonder what it contains... Found while Mining.

name: Buried Chest
description: A small chest, likely left behind by someone. I wonder what it contains... Found while Digging.

name: Backpack
description: A small backpack, likely left behind by someone. I wonder what it contains... Found while Exploring.

name: Meat
description: Tasty floor chicken. Found while Exploring.

name: Treasure Chest
description: A small chest, likely left behind by someone. I wonder what it contains... Found while Fishing.

name: Herb Pouch
description: A small pouch, likely left behind by someone. I wonder what it contains... Found while Farming.

name: Knife
description: Stabby looking tool, used in the Stove

name: Spices
description: A blend of herbs and spices.

name: Meat Stew
description: Cooked meat from raw meat stew.

name: Milk
description: There isn't cows in this world, so no one knows where it comes from. Used in the Stove workstation.

name: Egg
description: A raw eggy. Used in the Stove workstation.

name: Salt
description: A very salty kind of salt. Used in the Stove workstation.

name: Sugar
description: Addicting and tasty. Should be used in every recipe. Used in the Stove workstation.

name: Hammer
description: Smashy looking tool, used in the Furnace

name: Copper Bar
description: A refined copper bar smelted from copper ore and coal.

name: Tin Bar
description: A refined tin bar smelted from tin ore and coal.

name: Iron Bar
description: A refined iron bar smelted from iron ore and coal.

name: Silver Bar
description: A refined silver bar smelted from silver ore and coal.

name: Gold Bar
description: A refined gold bar smelted from gold ore and coal.

name: Platinum Bar
description: A refined platinum bar smelted from platinum ore and coal.

name: Adamantite Bar
description: A refined adamantite bar smelted from adamantite ore and coal.

name: Runic Bar
description: A refined runic bar smelted from runic ore and coal.

name: Solarite Bar
description: A refined solarite bar smelted from solarite ore and coal.

name: Arcanum Bar
description: A refined arcanum bar smelted from arcanum ore and coal.

name: Saw
description: Toothy looking tool, used in the Workbench.

name: Planks
description: Beautifully handcrafted planks from the spoils of trees.

name: Bucket
description: A bigger looking bowl. Can be found fishing.

name: Bowl
description: A bowl for putting food in.

name: Helmet
description: Metal helmet to protect your noggin

name: Chestplate
description: Metal chestplate to protect your body

name: Boots
description: Metal boots to protect your toes from stubbing

name: Armor Set
description: Everything you could need for a dungeon

name: Dungeon Key
description: A key used to unlock a dungeon.

name: Braymen's Letter
description: You are probably wondering how this got in here... A magician never reveals their secrets! Nevertheless, thank you for joining Koltera. I appreciate your support and if you need any help, feel free to jump in the discord (found in the navigation)! Oh, and you should probably sell this letter... I think you will need all the gold you can get.

name: Fire Flower
description: Plant in the garden to grow fire essence.

name: Wind Flower
description: Plant in the garden to grow wind essence.

name: Earth Flower
description: Plant in the garden to grow earth essence.

name: Water Flower
description: Plant in the garden to grow water essence.

name: Gold Flower
description: They say money doesn't grow on trees, but these flowers sure make some! Plant it in the garden to grow gold.

name: Fertilizer
description: Used to level up flowers in the garden. Found in chests from digging and the merchant.

name: Task Board Potion
description: A potion that allows you to reset every task board quest instantly. Can be bought at the Merchant.

name: Awaken Tree Potion
description: A potion that resets the Awaken Tree, refunding all spent Awaken Points. Can be bought at the Merchant.

name: Chronicle Rune
description: A rune forged with the dust of the past

name: Water Rune
description: A powerful rune extracted from the depths of dungeons.

name: Earth Rune
description: A powerful rune extracted from the depths of dungeons.

name: Fire Rune
description: A powerful rune extracted from the depths of dungeons.

name: Wind Rune
description: A powerful rune extracted from the depths of dungeons.

name: Infinity Stone
description: The most powerful stone in Koltera
